title: The Battles of Coronel and Falkland Islands
writer: Frank Bowden, John Buchan, Merritt Crawford
actors: Craighall Sherry, Hans von Slock, Roger Maxwell
plot: Dramatic reconstruction of two 1914 naval battles off Coronel and the Falkland Islands.The first a defeat of the British by Vice Admiral Maximilian von Spee, the second a retaliation by the British under vice Admiral Sturdee.
